name: address-broker-correction-wins
rationale: Broker intake states subject_property_address '52 Winston Boulevard'. loan_application doc shows '52 Winston Boulevard'. Broker corrects to '52 Winston Churchill Boulevard' (fuller street name) via reply. F1.AD canonical-map resolves to broker_correction (more specific value). Tests address-string correction at broker tier.
notes: Two-event sequence. Pair with A19 (docs-only) and A20 (normalization) for F1.AD coverage triplet.
